products.name: Trader Joe’s tote / snack request
products.fee: HK$30–80 service fee or 12–18% of item price
products.description: Tell us what you want from the US. We confirm price, space and pickup method before collecting deposit.

products.name: Canada pharmacy / local goods request
products.fee: HK$30–100 service fee depending on size
products.description: For light, legal and easy-to-carry items only. No prohibited goods, liquids over airline limits, or fragile items without confirmation.

products.name: Open request — tell us what to bring back
products.description: Submit a request. We check availability, luggage space, risk and final estimate.
